data.description: Explosions were reported in Iran's port city of Bandar Abbas as the US military carried out a 13th consecutive night of strikes. The attacks caused injuries and power outages, according to Iranian state media.

data.title: Bullish announces Siris to acquire non-core Equiniti business lines
data.description: Today, in George Town, Cayman Islands, Bullish (NYSE: BLSH) revealed that an affiliate of Siris has chosen to acquire specific non-core business lines of Equiniti: EQ Retirement Solutions, EQ Customer Resolutions, and Lenvi. The process to separate these lines will occur alongside Bullish's acquisition of Equiniti in January 2027. This move is subject to standard closing procedures and regulatory authorizations. Notably, financial details of these non-core businesses were not included in the initial transaction disclosures.

data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton Announces First Quarter Fiscal Year 2027 Results
data.description: In McLean, Virginia, Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH) has disclosed preliminary figures for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027.

data.title: GrafTech Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Brooklyn Heights, Ohio, GrafTech International Ltd. (NYSE: EAF) shared its unaudited financial report for the quarter and half-year ending on June 30, 2026. During the second quarter of 2026, the company saw a sales volume reaching 30.8 thousand metric tons, showcasing an 8% rise compared to the previous year and a sequential increase of 10% from the first quarter of 2026. Despite this positive volume trend, net sales totaled $127 million, reflecting a 3% decrease year-over-year; however, there was a 2% sequential uptick from the previous quarter.
ASTRAZENECA'S TRIXEO HAS BEEN RECOMMENDED FOR APPROVAL BY EU CHMP FOR ASTHMA MAINTENANCE TREATMENT.

data.title: The Gorman-Rupp Company Announces CFO Succession Plan
data.description: An Ohio-based company, the Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC), revealed that James C. Kerr, Executive VP and CFO, will be replaced by Ronald F. Stoops, the current VP of Finance, starting October 1, 2026. Kerr, who has been with the company since 2016, will aid in the transition and remain a senior advisor until retiring later. Stoops steps into the CFO role as Kerr's successor.

data.title: Gorman-Rupp Company Declares Cash Dividend
data.description: The company based in Mansfield, Ohio, The Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC), has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share on its common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on September 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of August 14, 2026. This upcoming payment will be the 306th consecutive quarterly dividend that the company has issued. Established in 1933, The Gorman-Rupp Company specializes in designing, manufacturing, and globally marketing pumps and related equipment.

data.title: Gorman-Rupp Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: MANSFIELD, Ohio-- The Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC) has released their financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2026. In this quarter, they achieved notable milestones with record net sales reaching $186.1 million, marking a 3.9% increase equating to $7.1 million compared to the same period in 2025. Additionally, they reported a record net income of $19.4 million, or $0.74 per share, which represents a significant growth from the $15.8 million, or $0.60 per share, earned in the second quarter of 2025. Adjusted EBITDA stood at $38.2 million, making up 20.5% of sales, showcasing an increase over the previous year.

data.title: Brazil uses tokenized cows as collateral for $19,600 loan on B3, marking early use of livestock as collateral.
data.description: In Brazil, ten dairy cows were tokenized to secure a loan worth $19,600 on the country's B3 exchange. This marks one of the initial instances in Brazil where tokenized livestock have been utilized as collateral for a loan.

data.title: NIQ Expands GenAI Capabilities Across gfknewron, Turning Trusted Intelligence into Decisions Faster
data.description: NIQ, a prominent consumer intelligence company trading on the NYSE under the symbol NIQ, recently revealed the advancement of AI-driven Smart Insights on its gfknewron® platform. This integration consolidates markets and categories, allowing businesses to efficiently convert intricate market, consumer, and supply chain data into actionable insights. The updated features empower users to swiftly recognize trends, opportunities, and performance factors, ultimately decreasing the time needed for analysis.
